Men's Basketball Schedule Roster Coaches Statistics Archived Stories Additional Links

2026-27 Men's Basketball Roster

3 Ty Odom

  • Position Guard
  • Height 6-1
  • Class Sophomore
  • Hometown Hartselle, Ala.
  • High School Hartselle High Schoole
  • Bio
  • Related
  • Stats
  • Historical

Biography

HIGH SCHOOL: Played four seasons at Hartselle High School... Was named All-State Honorable Mention in 2025... Averaged 20 points, five rebounds and two assists per game in his senior season... Was named Decatur Daily Player of the Week on three separate occasions... Honor Student

PERSONAL
Favorite Color: Blue
Favortie Food: Cheeseburger
